executive_summary:
PARK: Seaview Holiday Park
SCORE: 32/100
DATE SCORED: 2025
REVIEWS ANALYSED: 3

WHY THIS SCORE:
Entertainment (0/20) — No mention of any kids entertainment, activities, playgrounds, pools, or family facilities in any reviews.
Nature (8/20) — Located on Phillip Island which offers natural attractions nearby, though reviews specifically note "no views at all" from the park itself.
Cleanliness (6/15) — Limited feedback; one review mentions it's a "nice place" but no specific comments on cleanliness or maintenance standards.
Value (3/15) — Reviews explicitly state "unpowered sites are overpriced" indicating poor value perception for families.
Site Size (2/10) — Significant concerns raised: "can't even fit a 24ft caravan" in powered sites, indicating very limited space for family rigs.
Sentiment (3/10) — Predominantly negative with ratings of 1 and 2 stars in recent reviews; one reviewer states "Don't bother stopping there" suggesting they would not return or recommend.
Location (10/10) — Phillip Island is a premium family destination with penguin parade, beaches, and wildlife attractions in close proximity.

WHY NOT 100:
1. Complete absence of family entertainment facilities - no playgrounds, pools, or kids activities mentioned, which are essential for families with young children.
2. Poor value proposition with overpriced unpowered sites and very restrictive site sizes that can't accommodate standard family caravans over 24ft.
3. Overwhelmingly negative recent sentiment with two of three reviews giving 1-2 stars and explicitly warning others not to visit.

NOTABLE REVIEW PHRASES:
"Don't bother stopping there", "no views at all", "unpowered sites are overpriced", "can't even fit a 24ft caravan", "Nice place", "friendly people"
rationale_top3: Complete absence of on-site entertainment or facilities for children, which is critical for family holiday parks Site sizes are inadequate for family caravans, with specific mention that 24ft caravans won't fit in most spaces Poor perceived value with overpriced unpowered sites and overall negative sentiment from recent reviewers warning others not to visit
rationale_honourable: Phillip Island location provides excellent access to nearby family attractions including the penguin parade and beaches
water_fun: No pool or water facilities mentioned.
kids_play: No kids entertainment or facilities mentioned.
best_for: Based on current evidence, this park lacks the family-friendly facilities and amenities that Australian families with young children typically require.
